<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "2, ['Request for location-specific risk calibration data such as neighborhood safety scores, flood zones, and emergency response distance (no explicit template field for these underwriting risk metrics)', 'Requirement for user to provide full residential address including street name, building/apartment number, and postal code for regulatory verification (street and postal code exist, but building/apartment number and regulatory risk zoning compliance are not explicitly covered)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "14, ['Provision of multiple insurance bundle options with names, types, and monthly costs', 'Inclusion of health (physical and mental) coverage options', 'Inclusion of property coverage options', 'Inclusion of travel coverage options', 'Specification of coverage tiers (basic, standard, premium)', 'Family coverage for two adults and two children', 'Global coverage and multilingual 24/7 support', 'Telemedicine, preventive care, gym reimbursement, and family therapy features', 'Emergency coordination and direct billing network', 'Cost analysis including monthly and annual savings', 'Immediate or next-month policy activation options', 'Confirmation of policy and coverage activation (policy number, confirmation number)', 'Documentation status with digital delivery and confirmation details', 'Coverage gap prevention and transition confirmation']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 2, ['Request for location-specific risk calibration data such as neighborhood safety scores, flood zones, and emergency response distance (no explicit template field for these underwriting risk metrics)', 'Requirement for user to provide full residential address including street name, building/apartment number, and postal code for regulatory verification (street and postal code exist, but building/apartment number and regulatory risk zoning compliance are not explicitly covered)']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 14, ['Provision of multiple insurance bundle options with names, types, and monthly costs', 'Inclusion of health (physical and mental) coverage options', 'Inclusion of property coverage options', 'Inclusion of travel coverage options', 'Specification of coverage tiers (basic, standard, premium)', 'Family coverage for two adults and two children', 'Global coverage and multilingual 24/7 support', 'Telemedicine, preventive care, gym reimbursement, and family therapy features', 'Emergency coordination and direct billing network', 'Cost analysis including monthly and annual savings', 'Immediate or next-month policy activation options', 'Confirmation of policy and coverage activation (policy number, confirmation number)', 'Documentation status with digital delivery and confirmation details', 'Coverage gap prevention and transition confirmation']
